rationale: Diff contains only an execution metadata file (result.json) with no code or test changes. No audit lineage implementation, no queries by intent/entity ID, no approval/rejection metadata, and no redacted audit reads are present to evaluate against the acceptance criteria.

findings.summary: No implementation changes for audit approval/intent lineage; only an execution result.json was added.
Acceptance criterion (lineage queryable by intent ID and entity ID) cannot be verified — no audit query code or tests added.

Acceptance criterion (approvals/rejections include required metadata: actor, agent/tool identity, policy version, approver reason, intent ID, pre/post images) cannot be verified — no schema or recording logic added.
Acceptance criterion (redacted audit reads match entity read redaction per FEAT-029) cannot be verified — no redaction integration tests added.
